pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 17 if source/target levels remain at 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in newer compiler plugins and may cause warnings or errors; release flag is the standard for JDK 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to replace removed javax.annotation package in JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from JDK 17 (JEP 406), causing compilation errors for code using @Generated or similar annotations without an explicit dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on JDK 17 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting JDK 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support the release flag or JDK 17 bytecode generation correctly.
